name: carmax / Auto workflow 685
task: Find a store in Modesto California and set is as my store.

steps.label: Find a store
steps.observation:
At CarMax, you can buy online or at your nearest CarMax store. If you purchase in-store, you can still take buy online , you can choose between getting it delivered or picking it up at the store. No matter how you want your area . CarMax delivery is available within a 60-mile radius of select stores. Not available to customers in all states. Please contact nearest store for details. Applicable store-to-store shipping fees are due in advance of vehicle delivery and are separate from sales transactions.
